title: Trabaho lang dear, walang personalan
overview: A beautiful girl from the province has dreams of showbiz and answers an ad to become a carnival performer. When seduced by her playboy coworker, her parents force them to marry. Starring comedy legend Leo Martinez and sexy actress Amanda Page.
